case_title: TAPUSILIA OLOMUA VS. THE KROGER CO. DBA FOODS CO.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLOMUA, TAPUSILIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE KROGER CO. DBA FOODS CO. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT HAD ACTUAL OR CONSTRUCTIVE NOTICE OF CONDITION, OR ACTED UNREASONABLY UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLOMUA, TAPUSILIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-02-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: TODD WENZEL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-05-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE KROGER CO. DBA FOODS CO.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE KROGER CO. DBA FOODS CO.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY OLOMUA, TAPUSILIA AS TO DEFENDANT THE KROGER CO. DBA FOODS CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM TODD WENZEL FILED BY OLOMUA, TAPUSILIA THE KROGER CO. DBA FOODS CO.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLOMUA, TAPUSILIA AS TO DEFENDANT THE KROGER CO. DBA FOODS CO.
